question: Does the paper report HIV sequences from patient samples?
explain: The paper discusses the sequencing of the HIV-1 pol gene from proviral DNA and RNA samples obtained from patients. It mentions that HIV-1 pol genotyping by bulk sequencing was performed on DNA and RNA from viremic patients and DNA only among suppressed patients.
sentences: "We sequenced pol gene from proviral DNA among viremic and suppressed patients to identify drug resistance mutations." and "HIV-1 pol genotyping by bulk sequencing was performed on 38 DNA and RNA from viremic patients and DNA only among 82 suppressed patients at baseline."

question: Does the paper report in vitro drug susceptibility data?
explain: The paper focuses on sequencing and identifying drug resistance mutations in the HIV-1 pol gene from patient samples. It does not mention performing in vitro drug susceptibility tests.
sentences: "We sequenced pol gene from proviral DNA among viremic and suppressed patients to identify drug resistance mutations." and "HIV-1 pol genotyping by bulk sequencing was performed on 38 DNA and RNA from viremic patients and DNA only among 82 suppressed patients at baseline."

question: Does the paper report GenBank accession numbers for sequenced HIV isolates? If "Yes", what were the GenBank accession numbers for sequenced HIV isolates?
explain: The paper explicitly states that the HIV-1 PR and RT sequences recovered from PBMC and viral RNA have been submitted to GenBank with specific accession numbers.
sentences: "HIV-1 PR and RT sequences recovered from PBMC and viral RNA have been submitted to GenBank with the accession numbers KJ69464 to KJ769641."

question: Which HIV species were studied in the paper?
explain: The paper consistently refers to the sequencing and analysis of HIV-1 pol gene, indicating that the study focused on HIV-1.
sentences: "We sequenced pol gene from proviral DNA among viremic and suppressed patients to identify drug resistance mutations." and "HIV-1 pol genotyping by bulk sequencing was performed on 38 DNA and RNA from viremic patients and DNA only among 82 suppressed patients at baseline."

question: Which HIV genes were reported to have been sequenced?
answer: A. Protease, PR and B. Reverse transcriptase, RT
explain: The paper mentions that a 1,300-bp fragment encompassing the protease (PR) and the first 300 amino acids of the reverse transcriptase (RT) gene was generated for PCR amplification and sequencing.
sentences: "A 1,300-bp fragment encompassing the protease (PR) and the first 300 amino acids of the reverse transcriptase (RT) gene was generated from DNA and cDNA for PCR amplification, followed by a nested PCR."

question: From which countries were the sequenced samples obtained?
explain: The study population was recruited from the Peninsula AIDS Research Consortium clinic at the San Mateo County AIDS Program and the San Francisco Public Health Department clinic, both located in the United States.
sentences: "One hundred and twenty HIV infected individuals were recruited from the Peninsula AIDS Research Consortium clinic at the San Mateo County AIDS Program and the San Francisco Public Health Department clinic."

question: From what years were the sequenced samples obtained?
explain: The paper does not provide specific years during which the samples were obtained.

question: What method was used for sequencing?
explain: The paper describes the use of the Big Dye Terminator kit and capillary electrophoresis on a 3130xl Genetic Analyzer, which are components of Sanger sequencing.
sentences: "After quantification, 30ng were sequenced using the Big Dye Terminator kit (Life Technologies, Foster City, CA, USA) and a set of 4 bidirectional primers by capillary electrophoresis on a 3130xl Genetic Analyzer (Life Technologies)."

question: Were samples cloned prior to sequencing?
explain: The paper does not mention any cloning of samples prior to sequencing. It describes direct sequencing of PCR products.
sentences: "A 1,300-bp fragment encompassing the protease (PR) and the first 300 amino acids of the reverse transcriptase (RT) gene was generated from DNA and cDNA for PCR amplification, followed by a nested PCR."

question: Did samples undergo single genome sequencing?
explain: The paper describes bulk sequencing of PCR products, not single genome sequencing.
sentences: "HIV-1 pol genotyping by bulk sequencing was performed on 38 DNA and RNA from viremic patients and DNA only among 82 suppressed patients at baseline."

question: What clinical specimens were sequenced?
explain: The paper mentions that plasma and PBMC were used for sequencing. Plasma was used for RNA extraction, and PBMC was used for DNA extraction.
sentences: "Plasma was removed after centrifugation and PBMC were separated from whole blood by density gradient centrifugation and stored at -70°C in 90% human serum, 10% Dimethyl Sulfoxyde (DMSO)." and "DNA was extracted from pelleted PBMC using QIAamp DNA Blood Mini kit (QIAGEN Inc.)."

question: Were any sequences obtained from individuals with virological failure on a treatment regimen?
explain: The paper mentions that sequences were obtained from patients who virologically failed during follow-up.
sentences: "Only the vRNA was sequenced from patients who virologically failed during follow-up (n = 11)."

question: Were any sequences obtained from the proviral DNA reservoir?
explain: The paper discusses sequencing of proviral DNA from both viremic and suppressed patients.
sentences: "We sequenced pol gene from proviral DNA among viremic and suppressed patients to identify drug resistance mutations." and "HIV-1 pol genotyping by bulk sequencing was performed on 38 DNA and RNA from viremic patients and DNA only among 82 suppressed patients at baseline."

question: Were the patients in the study in a clinical trial?
explain: The study was a longitudinal study of drug resistance, not a clinical trial.
sentences: "One hundred and twenty HIV infected individuals were recruited from the Peninsula AIDS Research Consortium clinic at the San Mateo County AIDS Program and the San Francisco Public Health Department clinic, and enrolled in a longitudinal study of drug resistance."

question: How many individuals had samples obtained for HIV sequencing?
explain: The paper states that 120 HIV-infected individuals were enrolled in the study, and samples were obtained from these individuals for sequencing.
sentences: "The Peninsula AIDS Research Cohort study enrolled and followed over 2 years 120 HIV infected patients from San Mateo and San Francisco Counties." and "One hundred and twenty HIV infected individuals were recruited from the Peninsula AIDS Research Consortium clinic at the San Mateo County AIDS Program and the San Francisco Public Health Department clinic, and enrolled in a longitudinal study of drug resistance."

question: Does the paper report HIV sequences from individuals who had previously received ARV drugs?
explain: The paper mentions that 81% of the subjects were on antiretroviral therapy and had been treated for a median time of 7 years.
sentences: "Among 120 subjects, 81% were on antiretroviral therapy and had been treated for a median time of 7 years." and "Cumulative ART history included exposure to TDF (85%), AZT and/or d4T (57%) and 57% and 66% had received an NNRTI- or PI- based regimen respectively."

question: Which drug classes were received by individuals in the study before sample sequencing?
answer: A. NRTI, B. NNRTI, C. PI
explain: The paper mentions that the cumulative ART history of the participants included exposure to NRTIs, NNRTIs, and PIs.
sentences: "Cumulative ART history included exposure to TDF (85%), AZT and/or d4T (57%) and 57% and 66% had received an NNRTI- or PI- based regimen respectively."

question: Which drugs were received by individuals in the study before sample sequencing?
explain: The paper specifies that the cumulative ART history included exposure to Tenofovir (TDF), Zidovudine (AZT), Stavudine (d4T), NNRTIs, and PIs.
sentences: "Cumulative ART history included exposure to TDF (85%), AZT and/or d4T (57%) and 57% and 66% had received an NNRTI- or PI- based regimen respectively."
